rule: Direction only. Rank by hard OOS (2025-10→2026-07 + late 2025-07→2026-07) on core bag. You structure options.

why.v15_meta_xgb: Best pure OOS: +10.1% mean ret, Sharpe ~1.03, DD tiny. Full-window was mid-pack; OOS is what matters for paper.
why.v20b_macro_light: 2nd OOS equity. Macro light veto still useful.
why.v23_devin_overlay: Strong full-window; weaker OOS than v15. Keep as backup risk-on.
why.v32_soft_react_opts: Best full-window options DNA (+111% screen) but OOS near flat/neg. Use for entry *timing* only if you want options DNA; prefer v15 side if conflict.

how_to_use_ibkr_paper.2: signal > 0 → LONG direction (you pick the options structure)
how_to_use_ibkr_paper.4: If primary silent and you want a second opinion: v20b_macro_light
how_to_use_ibkr_paper.5: Do not auto-size options from backtest contract counts — your size, your structure

screen_full_window_note: Full-window options (v32 +111%) looked best but failed OOS — classic overfit trap. Paper follows OOS winners.
